title: EM on TCA Specialised Committee Decisions on Road Transport
body: "This explanatory memorandum concerns three European Commission proposals for a Council decision on the position to be taken on behalf of the European Union within the EU-UK Specialised Committee on Road Transport of the EU-UK Trade and Cooperation Agreement.  The following proposals, which have since been adopted, are :  European Commission Proposal for a Council decision on a common list of serious infringements which may lead to the loss of good repute  European Commission Proposal for a Council decision on the national electronic register of road transport undertakings and the modalities of exchange of information contained in these registers  European Commission Proposal for a Council decision on the amount and modalities of the UK’s financial contribution to road transport information systems managed by the Union and amending Decision No 1/2022 of the Specialised Committee on Road Transport  It was submitted by Keir Mather MP, Parliamentary Under-Secretary of State, Department for Transport. "
